base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of edge — a character (playable) from 1991 final fantasy iv. Edge Geraldine — Ninja Prince of Eblan. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
